main.title: PUBG
main.subtitle: Track detailed PUBG: BATTLEGROUNDS stats and leaderboards

compare.title: Player Comparison
compare.empty: Pick two or three players from your Favorites and tap Compare.

not_found.title: Player not found
not_found.description: We could not find this profile on the selected platform. Double-check the spelling and platform.
not_found.tips: Make sure the platform matches where the player actually plays.|Account names are case-sensitive.|Try the player's account ID if the nickname keeps failing.|If they have never logged into PUBG with the linked account, the API may not know them yet.

rate_limit.title: Hit the API rate limit
rate_limit.description: PUBG API throttled our requests. Wait about a minute and try again - cached results may still load.
rate_limit.tips: Refresh in 30-60 seconds.|If you only see partial data, that is the cached fallback.|Less popular profiles take longer to refresh from cache.

private.title: Private or hidden profile
private.description: This profile is private or has restricted PUBG API visibility.
private.tips: Ask the player to set their PUBG profile to public.|Steam profile privacy may also block avatar fetch.

network.title: Connection problem
network.description: Could not reach the tracker backend. Check your internet and try again.
network.tips: Check your internet connection.|Try a different network if you are on VPN.|If problem persists, our service may be temporarily down.

generic.title: Could not load player
generic.description: Something went wrong while loading the profile. The detail below may help.
generic.tips: Try again in a moment.|If it keeps failing, open Bug Report and include the error message.

weapons.title: Weapon Mastery
weapons.subtitle: {count} weapons tracked
weapons.empty: Weapon mastery data is not available yet.

squad.title: Squad-mates
squad.subtitle: From last {count} matches
squad.empty: No teammate data found in recent matches.

overlay.copyFallback: Copy this URL into OBS browser source:

matchHeatmap.loading: Loading telemetry (it can take a moment)...
matchHeatmap.helpIntro: This is a top-down map of your match showing where key things happened to you:
matchHeatmap.helpDrop: Blue dot - where you parachuted in.
matchHeatmap.helpKill: Green dot - where you killed an enemy. ×N means multiple kills at the same spot.
matchHeatmap.helpPath: The dashed line connects events in time order - it is your path through the match.
matchHeatmap.helpCompass: Compass letters (N/E/S/W) and grid lines (1km / 500m / 250m depending on zoom) help you orient.
matchHeatmap.helpHover: Hover any dot for who/what/when. Multi-event dots list all stacked events.
matchHeatmap.storyTravel: Travelled {distance} from drop to your final position.
matchHeatmap.storySurvivedOne: Survived with 1 kill on the board.
matchHeatmap.storySurvivedMany: Survived with {count} kills on the board.
matchHeatmap.storyAlive: You were alive at match end.

maps.noMatches: No matches to show on the map yet.
maps.aggregateEmpty: No accumulated data for this map yet — open a few matches to build it up.

help.title: Help & FAQ
help.subtitle: Quick answers about search, seasons, favorites, and PUBG Report integration.
help.empty: No matching questions. Try a different keyword.
help.contact: If your issue is not listed, open Bug Report and describe what happened.

search.q: How do I search for a player?
search.a: Use the search field on the main page, choose platform (Steam/Xbox/PSN/Stadia/Kakao), and enter nickname, account ID, or profile URL.

season.a: Current season is selected by default. You can switch to previous seasons from the season dropdown on the player page.

missingStats.q: Why are season stats empty or too low?
missingStats.a: PUBG API can return limited or delayed data for some accounts/seasons. Also, requesting a wrong platform may show no stats.

avatar.a: Steam avatar requires a valid Steam API key on backend. If avatar cannot be resolved, fallback avatar is used.

reports.q: What is the PUBG Report tab?
reports.a: This tab shows encounters found via PUBG Report where kills/deaths were captured on Twitch streams.

favorites.q: How do Favorites and History work?
favorites.a: Favorites and local history are stored in your browser. Recent searched list is served from backend recent searches.

limits.q: What does Rate Limit Reached mean?
limits.a: PUBG API has request limits. When limit is reached, tracker can temporarily serve cached data until cooldown passes.

platforms.a: Steam, Xbox, PlayStation, Stadia, and Kakao shards are supported. Make sure you pick the same platform where the player actually plays.

footer.text1: Real-time PUBG stats - K/D, damage, win rate, longest kills, ranked progression and recent matches across every platform.
footer.text2: Save favorites, follow friends and streamers, and watch your performance evolve season after season.
footer.developed: Built by Satel for the PUBG community

words.cleanListConfirm: Are you sure to clean favorites list?
words.noFavorites: You can add players to favorites list.

cookie.text: We use cookies on our website to save searched players history, and for page Favorites. By clicking 'Accept', you consent to the use All the cookies
